{'id': '91a4a9dc-1d21-328e-888e-6388a4e797b9', 'contentType': 'STORY', 'title': 'Nvidia halves Asia AI chip customer list, FT reports', 'description': '', 'summary': 'Nvidia has more than halved the number of Asian customers \u200cauthorized to buy its AI chips \u200cafter creating a new "white list" of companies that have \u200bpassed tougher compliance checks aimed at preventing the products from reaching China, the Financial Times reported on Monday.  Nvidia did \u200bnot immediately\xa0respond \u200bto a Reuters \u200brequest for comment outside \u200cregular business hours.  Under a renewed review, over half of Nvidia\'s previous customers, especially neo-cloud providers, were excluded, the report said, adding that companies that failed the initial review could \u200cmake changes and reapply.', 'pubDate': '2026-07-14T03:31:40Z', 'displayTime': '2026-07-14T03:31:40Z', 'isHosted': True, 'bypassModal': False, 'previewUrl': None, 'thumbnail': {'originalUrl': 'https://media.zenfs.com/en/reuters-finance.com/86ee9ef2e2723210c969c9236b89ff14', 'originalWidth': 800, 'originalHeight': 533, 'caption': 'Illustration of Nvidia logo', 'resolutions': [{'url': 'https://s.yimg.com/uu/api/res/1.2/KJ3r.grN4vqXb7xFeZ_73w--~B/aD01MzM7dz04MDA7YXBwaWQ9eXRhY2h5b24-/https://media.zenfs.com/en/reuters-finance.com/86ee9ef2e2723210c969c9236b89ff14', 'width': 800, 'height': 533, 'tag': 'original'}, {'url': 'https://s.yimg.com/uu/api/res/1.2/atLWvcj6rtipEdvzHlXAdg--~B/Zmk9c3RyaW07aD0xMjg7dz0xNzA7YXBwaWQ9eXRhY2h5b24-/https://media.zenfs.com/en/reuters-finance.com/86ee9ef2e2723210c969c9236b89ff14', 'width': 170, 'height': 128, 'tag': '170x128'}]}, 'provider': {'displayName': 'Reuters', 'url': 'http://www.reuters.com/', 'sourceId': 'reuters-finance.com'}, 'canonicalUrl': {'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/technology/ai/articles/nvidia-halves-asia-buyer-list-033140201.html', 'site': 'finance', 'region': 'US', 'lang': 'en-US'}, 'clickThroughUrl': {'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/technology/ai/articles/nvidia-halves-asia-buyer-list-033140201.html', 'site': 'finance', 'region': 'US', 'lang': 'en-US'}, 'metadata': {'editorsPick': False}, 'finance': {'premiumFinance': {'isPremiumNews': False, 'isPremiumFreeNews': False}}, 'storyline': None}

{'id': '01d8272a-ce7d-3b67-a2ea-4ea170690d7e', 'contentType': 'STORY', 'title': 'TSMC seen riding AI boom to fifth straight quarter of record profit', 'description': '', 'summary': "TSMC, the world's largest manufacturer of advanced AI chips, will likely notch a fifth consecutive quarter of record earnings, driven \u200cby booming AI infrastructure spending.  Analysts say demand for Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co's (TSMC) 3-nanometre and 2-nanometre \u200cprocess technologies for AI chips, as well as for its advanced chip packaging technology, CoWoS, remains strong.  Its market capitalisation is now nearly double that of South Korean rival Samsung Electronics at around $1.97 trillion.", 'pubDate': '2026-07-14T03:11:06Z', 'displayTime': '2026-07-14T03:11:06Z', 'isHosted': True, 'bypassModal': False, 'previewUrl': None, 'thumbnail': {'originalUrl': 'https://media.zenfs.com/en/reuters-finance.com/91a72a9a5b5fe33aa42a48367f285d45', 'originalWidth': 800, 'originalHeight': 521, 'caption': "People stand behind a sign with a TSMC logo during TSMC's third quarter earnings conference in Taipei", 'resolutions': [{'url': 'https://s.yimg.com/uu/api/res/1.2/JDtv9WGNmbuOiiT.ECanVg--~B/aD01MjE7dz04MDA7YXBwaWQ9eXRhY2h5b24-/https://media.zenfs.com/en/reuters-finance.com/91a72a9a5b5fe33aa42a48367f285d45', 'width': 800, 'height': 521, 'tag': 'original'}, {'url': 'https://s.yimg.com/uu/api/res/1.2/6HPyjipQI8OluLr.dmSjlQ--~B/Zmk9c3RyaW07aD0xMjg7dz0xNzA7YXBwaWQ9eXRhY2h5b24-/https://media.zenfs.com/en/reuters-finance.com/91a72a9a5b5fe33aa42a48367f285d45', 'width': 170, 'height': 128, 'tag': '170x128'}]}, 'provider': {'displayName': 'Reuters', 'url': 'http://www.reuters.com/', 'sourceId': 'reuters-finance.com'}, 'canonicalUrl': {'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/technology/ai/articles/tsmc-seen-riding-ai-boom-031106342.html', 'site': 'finance', 'region': 'US', 'lang': 'en-US'}, 'clickThroughUrl': {'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/technology/ai/articles/tsmc-seen-riding-ai-boom-031106342.html', 'site': 'finance', 'region': 'US', 'lang': 'en-US'}, 'metadata': {'editorsPick': False}, 'finance': {'premiumFinance': {'isPremiumNews': False, 'isPremiumFreeNews': False}}, 'storyline': None}

{'id': 'aa39d993-f08b-3713-8d1f-6b46d0e43187', 'contentType': 'STORY', 'title': 'Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Launches Vera Rubin NVL4 Blueprint For AI Infrastructure', 'description': '', 'summary': "Super Micro Computer launched its Data Center Building Block Solutions blueprint around the NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL4 platform.
